'''jazate''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Adverbs|adverb]] meaning "[[Wikt:omentally|omentally]] (auto-generated)".

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| j-z-d
|-
! Word class
| [[Adverb]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:omentally|omentally]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Citation form
| jazate
|}

== Inflected forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Form !! Surface form
|-
| [[positive]].[[present]] || [[word:jazate|jazate]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[mythic]] || [[word:jazatesher|jazatesher]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[mythic]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:jazatesherĂ«m|jazatesherĂ«m]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[past]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:jazatero|jazatero]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:jazateshĂ«|jazateshĂ«]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:jazateshĂ«m|jazateshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hesternal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gokijazatero|gokijazatero]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hesternal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gokijazateshĂ«|gokijazateshĂ«]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hesternal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokijazateshĂ«m|gokijazateshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gojazankerom|gojazankerom]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gojazankeshĂ«|gojazankeshĂ«]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gojazankeshĂ«m|gojazankeshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:gojazankeya|gojazankeya]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[future]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:jazaterom|jazaterom]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[future]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:jazatemu|jazatemu]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[future]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:jazateya|jazateya]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[crastinal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gokijazaterom|gokijazaterom]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[crastinal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokijazatemu|gokijazatemu]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[crastinal]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:gokijazateya|gokijazateya]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[present]] || [[word:jazazate|jazazate]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[mythic]] || [[word:jazazatesher|jazazatesher]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[mythic]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:jazazatesherĂ«m|jazazatesherĂ«m]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[past]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:jazazatero|jazazatero]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:jazazateshĂ«|jazazateshĂ«]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:jazazateshĂ«m|jazazateshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hesternal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gokijazazatero|gokijazazatero]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hesternal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gokijazazateshĂ«|gokijazazateshĂ«]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hesternal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokijazazateshĂ«m|gokijazazateshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gojazazankerom|gojazazankerom]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gojazazankeshĂ«|gojazazankeshĂ«]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gojazazankeshĂ«m|gojazazankeshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:gojazazankeya|gojazazankeya]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[future]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:jazazaterom|jazazaterom]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[future]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:jazazatemu|jazazatemu]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[future]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:jazazateya|jazazateya]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[crastinal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gokijazazaterom|gokijazazaterom]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[crastinal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokijazazatemu|gokijazazatemu]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[crastinal]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:gokijazazateya|gokijazazateya]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[present]] || [[word:jĂŠzĂŠte|jĂŠzĂŠte]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[mythic]] || [[word:jĂŠzĂŠtesher|jĂŠzĂŠtesher]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[mythic]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:jĂŠzĂŠtesherĂ«m|jĂŠzĂŠtesherĂ«m]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[past]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:jĂŠzĂŠtero|jĂŠzĂŠtero]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:jĂŠzĂŠteshĂ«|jĂŠzĂŠteshĂ«]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:jĂŠzĂŠteshĂ«m|jĂŠzĂŠteshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hesternal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gokijĂŠzĂŠtero|gokijĂŠzĂŠtero]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hesternal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gokijĂŠzĂŠteshĂ«|gokijĂŠzĂŠteshĂ«]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hesternal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokijĂŠzĂŠteshĂ«m|gokijĂŠzĂŠteshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gojĂŠzĂŠnkerom|gojĂŠzĂŠnkerom]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gojĂŠzĂŠnkeshĂ«|gojĂŠzĂŠnkeshĂ«]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gojĂŠzĂŠnkeshĂ«m|gojĂŠzĂŠnkeshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:gojĂŠzĂŠnkeya|gojĂŠzĂŠnkeya]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[future]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:jĂŠzĂŠterom|jĂŠzĂŠterom]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[future]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:jĂŠzĂŠtemu|jĂŠzĂŠtemu]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[future]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:jĂŠzĂŠteya|jĂŠzĂŠteya]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[crastinal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gokijĂŠzĂŠterom|gokijĂŠzĂŠterom]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[crastinal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokijĂŠzĂŠtemu|gokijĂŠzĂŠtemu]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[crastinal]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:gokijĂŠzĂŠteya|gokijĂŠzĂŠteya]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[present]] || [[word:jafzafte|jafzafte]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[mythic]] || [[word:jafzaftesher|jafzaftesher]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[mythic]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:jafzaftesherĂ«m|jafzaftesherĂ«m]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[past]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:jafzaftero|jafzaftero]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:jafzafteshĂ«|jafzafteshĂ«]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:jafzafteshĂ«m|jafzafteshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hesternal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gokijafzaftero|gokijafzaftero]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hesternal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gokijafzafteshĂ«|gokijafzafteshĂ«]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hesternal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokijafzafteshĂ«m|gokijafzafteshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gojafzafnkerom|gojafzafnkerom]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gojafzafnkeshĂ«|gojafzafnkeshĂ«]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gojafzafnkeshĂ«m|gojafzafnkeshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:gojafzafnkeya|gojafzafnkeya]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[future]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:jafzafterom|jafzafterom]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[future]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:jafzaftemu|jafzaftemu]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[future]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:jafzafteya|jafzafteya]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[crastinal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gokijafzafterom|gokijafzafterom]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[crastinal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokijafzaftemu|gokijafzaftemu]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[crastinal]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:gokijafzafteya|gokijafzafteya]]
|}

''76 forms generated.''

== See also ==
